validation: heading_deg must be 001-360

state_changes: set assigned.heading_true_deg to current aircraft heading
write heading scratchpad token from current magnetic heading
validation: aircraft must have a current heading

state_changes: set controller speed policy type target
mark speed as explicit controller assignment
validation: speed_kt must be positive
speed_kt must not exceed global max 310 kt
if aircraft is at or below 10000 ft, target speed must not exceed 250 kt
if target speed conflicts with a published STAR/APP speed cap within 5 NM of the restricted fix, ask confirm cancel speed restriction before applying

state_changes: clear controller minimum practical speed command
validation: published STAR/APP speed restrictions remain active
10000 ft / 250 kt hard cap remains active
minimum speed 155 kt is not an automatic below-5000-ft floor

state_changes: set controller speed policy type minimum_practical
do not treat the command as an OR GREATER floor
allow ILS landing speed profile to continue below 155 kt inside 5 NM
validation: aircraft should be an arrival aircraft
published STAR/APP speed caps and 10000 ft / 250 kt hard cap remain active

state_changes: release restriction when passing altitude_ft or passing fix_id
after release, resume explicit assigned speed if present, otherwise phase default speed
validation: speed_kt must be positive
exactly one release condition must be provided: altitude_ft or fix_id
speed floor must not conflict with 10000 ft / 250 kt rule unless an approval/exception flag exists

state_changes: OR LESS sets maximum speed ceiling
OR GREATER sets minimum speed floor
restriction remains active until cancelled, superseded, or released by resume normal speed
validation: speed_kt must be positive
speed_limit_direction must be or_less or or_greater
speed_kt must not exceed global max 310 kt
or_greater above 250 kt is not valid at or below 10000 ft
if target/minimum floor conflicts with a published STAR/APP speed cap within 5 NM of the restricted fix, ask confirm cancel speed restriction before applying
OR GREATER is a true speed floor and is separate from MINIMUM SPEED

state_changes: use default climb/descent rate unless vertical rate is explicit
validation: altitude_ft must be usable in current sector
apply 10000 ft speed compliance before descent crossing
vertical_rate_fpm must not exceed aircraft profile envelope

state_changes: set managed vertical energy mode to increase_descent_rate
validation: aircraft must be descending or have lower assigned altitude

state_changes: set managed vertical energy mode to increase_climb_rate
validation: aircraft must be climbing or have higher assigned altitude

state_changes: set managed vertical energy mode to expedite_descent
validation: aircraft must be descending or have lower assigned altitude

state_changes: set managed vertical energy mode to expedite_climb
validation: aircraft must be climbing or have higher assigned altitude

state_changes: set managed vertical energy mode to normal
validation: aircraft must be climbing or have higher assigned altitude

state_changes: set managed vertical energy mode to normal
validation: aircraft must be descending or have lower assigned altitude

state_changes: clear approach phase and procedure capture transition
if altitude_ft is present, set assigned target altitude
if cancel_level_restriction.scope is DIRECT_FIX, do not preserve previous procedure altitude restrictions
validation: fix_id must resolve in radar dataset
active target must be on matched STAR route
departure_runway and exit_fix must match available SID
runway must match current runway mode or aircraft target_runway

state_changes: keep route_mode as vector unless aligned final capture is eligible
set final route to runway threshold when aligned
validation: runway must be a supported visual approach runway
aircraft must be an APP arrival
final capture requires heading, lateral, and threshold-distance gates
aircraft must be approach/landing candidate

state_changes: start missed approach route from procedure data
validation: missed approach data must exist for active approach/runway
fix_id must resolve
hold entry algorithm must be available

state_changes: enable procedure altitude restriction following by default
when cancel_level_restriction.scope is STAR, cancel published STAR altitude restrictions only
when target_altitude_ft is provided, set assigned target altitude
always preserve MVA and safety floor
validation: active STAR or provided arrival procedure constraints must exist
target_altitude_ft must be compatible with MVA/safety floor
cancel_level_restriction.scope must be STAR for DESCEND_VIA
cancel_level_restriction must not cancel approach clearance crossing altitude unless explicitly scoped to an approach fix

state_changes: if scope is APP_FIX, cancel only the named approach fix altitude restriction
preserve final glidepath and assigned target altitude
if scope is APP_ALL, require confirmation before adapter mutation
validation: scope must be APP_FIX or APP_ALL for standalone cancellation
APP_FIX scope requires fix_id
APP_ALL must produce a confirm-before-execute response

state_changes: if fix_id is provided, add that fix to cancelled_speed_restriction_fixes
if fix_id is omitted but an active 5 NM speed restriction conflict exists, cancel the active restricted fix
do not create or preserve an automatic 155 kt floor
validation: fix_id must be on the active procedure route when provided
unscoped cancellation requires an active speed restriction conflict or confirmation
cancel speed restriction does not cancel altitude restrictions

state_changes: do not mutate aircraft position, speed, altitude, heading, or route
validation: callsign must resolve to an aircraft
aircraft should be in first-contacted or awaiting-controller-response state
if addressed to a callsign after a jam, request only that aircraft to repeat the first-contact call
if no callsign and phrase requests the calling station to repeat, select one unresolved jammed aircraft in deterministic queue order
if phrase is only confirm callsign, keep callsign-only confirmation behavior

state_changes: execute the currently pending confirm-before-execute action
if the pending action is a speed restriction conflict, cancel the pending restricted fix and then apply the original speed command
validation: a pending confirmation must exist
affirm without pending confirmation produces no aircraft state change

state_changes: clear the currently pending confirm-before-execute action without changing aircraft state
validation: a pending confirmation may exist
negative never applies the pending engine effect
